memberdef.definition: void(* bt_mesh_cfg_cli_cb::comp_data) (struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t page, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t page, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.name: comp_data

briefdescription.para: Optional callback for Composition data messages.

detaileddescription.para: Handles received Composition data messages from a server.

simplesect.para: For decoding buf, please refer to bt_mesh_comp_p0_get and bt_mesh_comp_p1_elem_pull.

parameterdescription.para: Client that received the status message.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_mesh_cfg_cli_cb::mod_pub_status) (struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t status, uint16_t elem_addr, uint16_t mod_id, uint16_t cid, struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli_mod_pub *pub)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t status, uint16_t elem_addr, uint16_t mod_id, uint16_t cid, struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli_mod_pub *pub)
memberdef.name: mod_pub_status

briefdescription.para: Optional callback for Model Pub status messages.

detaileddescription.para: Handles received Model Pub status messages from a server.

parameterdescription.para: Client that received the status message.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_mesh_cfg_cli_cb::mod_sub_status) (struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t status, uint16_t elem_addr, uint16_t sub_addr, uint32_t mod_id)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t status, uint16_t elem_addr, uint16_t sub_addr, uint32_t mod_id)
memberdef.name: mod_sub_status

briefdescription.para: Optional callback for Model Sub Status messages.

detaileddescription.para: Handles received Model Sub Status messages from a server.

parameterdescription.para: Client that received the status message.
The unicast address of the element.
The model ID within the element.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_mesh_cfg_cli_cb::mod_sub_list) (struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t status, uint16_t elem_addr, uint16_t mod_id, uint16_t cid, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t status, uint16_t elem_addr, uint16_t mod_id, uint16_t cid, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.name: mod_sub_list

briefdescription.para: Optional callback for Model Sub list messages.

detaileddescription.para: Handles received Model Sub list messages from a server.

simplesect.para: The buf parameter should be decoded using net_buf_simple_pull_le16 in iteration, as long as buf->len is greater than or equal to 2.

parameterdescription.para: Client that received the status message.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_mesh_cfg_cli_cb::node_reset_status) (struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr)
memberdef.name: node_reset_status

briefdescription.para: Optional callback for Node Reset Status messages.

detaileddescription.para: Handles received Node Reset Status messages from a server.

parameterdescription.para: Client that received the status message.

memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t status, uint8_t transmit)
memberdef.name: relay_status

briefdescription.para: Optional callback for Relay Status messages.

detaileddescription.para: Handles received Relay Status messages from a server.

parameterdescription.para: Client that received the status message.
The relay retransmit count and interval steps.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_mesh_cfg_cli_cb::net_key_status) (struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t status, uint16_t net_idx)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, uint8_t status, uint16_t net_idx)

detaileddescription.para: Handles received NetKey Status messages from a server.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_mesh_cfg_cli_cb::net_key_list) (struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_mesh_cfg_cli *cli, uint16_t addr, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.name: net_key_list

briefdescription.para: Optional callback for Netkey list messages.

detaileddescription.para: Handles received Netkey list messages from a server.

simplesect.para: The buf parameter should be decoded using the bt_mesh_key_idx_unpack_list helper function.

parameterdescription.para: Client that received the status message.

briefdescription.para: Optional callback for LPN PollTimeout Status messages.

detaileddescription.para: Handles received LPN PollTimeout Status messages from a server.

parameterdescription.para: Client that received the status message.
The unicast address of the LPN.
Current value of PollTimeout timer of the LPN.
